entry.title: Re: Is it Possible in SAC to split a line chart into mult...
entry.content:
Hi,

Trellis  option you can make use here to split the original Line chart into multiple charts based on 'Product' dimension in your case. Here is example where the simple line chart has been split based on Product.

Thanks,

Venkat

entry.title: Re: Treetable minRow count with Interactive rowMode
entry.content: Hi, yesss, that works perfect. When testing your answer I initially I just missed the include xmlns:mode="sap.ui.table.rowmodes"

entry.title: Re: Over-Delivery Qty Tolerance with the customer credit...
entry.content: I Just tried that and will not work with us, My case is limited to the customer credit limit is must, the tolerance is not fixed percentage or fixed amount, it is only the extra value added by the tolerance quantity in the delivery level, so if the Credit limit + Tolerance value is equal to sales value , Then accept to exceed the credit limit for the customer , Got my point jignesh ?

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Magdeburg Sommertreffen
entry.content:
🌞Save the Date: SAP Stammtisch Sommertreffen 🌞

Unser nächstes SAP Stammtisch Treffen findet am Montag, den 29.07.2024 um 19:00 Uhr statt – dieses Mal offline, auf der Terrasse des S4Campus in Magdeburg!

Weitere Informationen findet ihr auf unserer Community-Seite!

Wir sehen uns dort! 🚀

______

🌞Save the Date: SAP Stammtisch summer meeting 🌞

Our next SAP Stammtisch meeting will take place on Monday, July 29, 2024 at 7:00 p.m. - this time offline, on the terrace of the S4Campus in Magdeburg!
You can find more information on our community page!

See you there! 🚀

entry.title: Re: SAP Build app transaction data not being saved to Vis...
entry.content: And one more thing: have you changed anything in your VCF AFTER you deployed it? If so, please try to deploy your VCF once again and update the integration in your application project. I had once issues with the VCF when I made changes in the entity definition but then I forgot to redeploy the changed VCF and to update the integration.

entry.title: Formula for value on a component in a BOM... or suggestions for the right direction
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question regarding BOM formulas for calculating ink cartridge consumption in a printing company scenario.

Scenario:

I use a BOM to manage ink cartridges for printed labels. The current formula calculates ink based on a ratio (e.g., 5 cartridges per 1000 sheets). However, this results in underestimation for quantities exceeding the base unit (1000 sheets).

For example:

  • Printing 1100 sheets should require 10 cartridges, not 5.1 (rounded to 6) or 5 (standard rounding).
  • Printing 3000 sheets should require 15 cartridges.

Desired Functionality:

I'd like to implement a rounding rule in the BOM that mimics Excel's "CEILING" function. This would ensure we account for the full cartridge needed when exceeding the base quantity.

Formula Example that I can use (if it is possible to insert it on SAP):

ROUND(Order Quantity / 1000 sheets) * Cartridge Consumption Rate

Using this formula with the 1100 sheet example:

  • ROUND(1100 sheets / 1000 sheets) * 5 cartridges= round( 1,1) * 5 = 2 * 5 = 10 cartridges

Question:

Can I achieve this rounding behavior using CS02 or another standard SAP transaction?

Additional Notes:

  • The number of cartridges per label can vary depending on customer colour requests (3, 4, etc.).
  • BOM variants are not suitable as customer order volumes are unpredictable (1000, 1,000,000, or 10,000,000 labels).

Reason for Request:

This functionality is crucial for accurate cost estimation in CK11N, which the finance department uses to understand material costs per printed label.

Looking Forward:

Appreciate any suggestions on achieving the desired rounding behavior within the BOM structure. If there are limitations in the standard functionality, please let me know what alternative solutions I can explore. I'm in production and not an SAP expert, but I'm happy to learn new things if you can point me in the right direction. 😀

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan Call Scheduling type/status
entry.content: IP19 will do. Navigate to Maintenance item there.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Sommertreffen am 29.07.2024
entry.content:
Wir freuen uns, euch zum SAP Stammtisch Sommertreffen einzuladen! Wie im letzten Jahr findet unser Juli-Stammtisch nicht online, sondern in Präsenz auf der Terrasse des UCC (Erzbergerstraße 1, 39104 Magdeburg) statt.

Neben einer entspannten Atmosphäre mit Verpflegung und Getränken erwarten euch auch spannende, spontane Themen. Eine großartige Gelegenheit, sich auszutauschen, zu vernetzen und neue Ideen zu entwickeln!

👨‍💻👩‍💻Spoiler Alert: Wir arbeiten an der Idee eines firmenübergreifenden Hackathons, der voraussichtlich im September stattfinden wird. Das Juli-Treffen ist die perfekte Gelegenheit, diese Idee vorzustellen, Erwartungen und Wünsche zu sammeln und vielleicht schon erste Teams zusammenzustellen. Wir suchen eure Ideen, Interessen und Angebote – auch über SAP hinaus!

✉️Bitte meldet Euch für die Planung per E-Mail an magdeburg@sapstammtisch.org oder über das Event in der SAP Community an.

Bei Interesse oder Fragen könnt ihr uns gerne auch vorab per E-Mail kontaktieren.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Teilnahme!

______

We are pleased to invite you to the SAP Stammtisch summer meeting! As last year, our July regulars' table will not take place online, but in person on the terrace of the UCC (Erzbergerstraße 1, 39104 Magdeburg).

In addition to a relaxed atmosphere with food and drinks, you can also expect exciting, spontaneous topics. A great opportunity to exchange ideas, network and develop new ones!

Spoiler Alert: We are working on the idea of a cross-company hackathon, which is expected to take place in September. The July meeting is the perfect opportunity to present this idea, gather expectations and wishes and perhaps already put together the first teams. We are looking for your ideas, interests and offers - also beyond SAP!

Please register for the planning by e-mail to magdeburg@sapstammtisch.org or via the event in the SAP Community.

If you are interested or have any questions, you can also contact us in advance by e-mail.

We look forward to your participation!

entry.title: "CST No." "" (for "Location" "asigned to "Warehouse" "" and assigned to "Branch" ") does not match
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am facing error while generated update the warehouse location.  Error like : 

"CST No." "" (for "Location" "Gurugram-1", assigned to "Warehouse" "Gurugram Storage 2" and assigned to "Branch" "GURUGRAM") does not match "Branch GST No." XXXXXXXXXX

SAP Business One, 

When I am changing the Location into warehouse master under same branch then facing this type of error. 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

Solved.

Parameter need to add into <uri> tag.  In CPI, Message Mapping cases as below.

Thanks for your response!!

The system variable does not work, neither on desktop browser nor on mobile browser. 

"systemVars.runtime".

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi Dan,

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Text Size based on device type in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi Dan,

entry.title: BAPI_PLANNEDORDER_CREATE: Shift basic finish date to next workday not possible
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we use the BAPI BAPI_PLANNEDORDER_CREATE to create planned orders. If the basic finish date is not a work day, the date is shifted to the previous work day. Also while creating manually a planned order with transaction code MD11 the system shifts the basic finish date to the previous workday if  this day is not a workday. That leads to my question: Is it possible to force SAP to shift the date to the next work day instead to the previous workday? I can't find neither a customizing setting nor a BAPI import parameter.

entry.title: Feature "reassign" inside the CPQ and inside the quote is needed
entry.content:
Currently it is not possible to use the feature "reassign" inside the quote in C4C.

And when landing from C4C to CPQ, there is no My Quotes page available.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Feature "reassign" inside the CPQ and inside the quot...
entry.content:
Users who land on the landing page from C4C to CPQ, cannot access the Load Existing Project/Quotation page (My Quotes page), so they’ll always land on the quote that they’ve opened in SAP Cloud for Customer.

Other than the quote, the only pages users have access to are User Page and Quote Layout under the Setup icon.

Additionally, administrator users also have access to the following pages: Setup, Log, and Developer Console.

All of this is explained in this help document: https://help.sap.com/doc/f72edd8bc0ca43b5b9727fdbdaf73cfc/2405/en-US/f8edda558a4b4d1fb6ee6d515f4a5e30.pdf

 

If you need the Reassign button to show up inside the quote, then you will need to enable the Reassign action under Workflow for the required quote status.

Please find the below help links on how to enable Actions in Workflow:

Workflow Permissions | SAP Help Portal

Workflow | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: SAP Master Data Governance solutions compared to each other. Get a quick overview.
entry.content: Thanks Andreas for this comprehensive overview!

entry.title: How to do authorization check for personnel no (PERNR) in PM order confirmation
entry.content:
Hi SAP PM Guru, 

Business requires to add personnel no check during order confirmation to ensure only authorized personnel is allowed to do confirmation.

There are 2 options:

1. Personnel no. is specified in work center capacity. 

2. Personnel no. is linked to HR infotype 1001 (relationship) for qualification control. 

For either of the above mentioned, is there any authorization object which can be added in confirmation?

Please kindly help.

Sally

entry.title: How to import inspection plan in Bulk
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We have to create a lot of inspection plans in SAP and we could not find any chance to upload the inspection plan.
May you kindly suggest how we could upload it?

Thank you and BR


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to import inspection plan in Bulk
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

SAP Business ByDesign doesn't support importing inspection plan in bulk, you need to create manually. Please refer to help document Create an Inspection Plan.

We recommend you to post your query in SAP Business ByDesign Customer Influence Forum https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886 so that our development can look into it. Please note you may search it firstly and if it is not found, please register your requirement for this new feature.

Other customers can then vote for it, which will assert its legitimacy as a standard feature by showing the industry need and in turn influence the implementation schedule of the requirement.

Henry

SAP Support

entry.title: Welcome to the SAP Academic Board Iberoamerica members for 2025-2027!
entry.content:
Dear

SAP University Alliances Iberoamerican Community, 

We would like to welcome our successor of the SAP Academic Board Iberoamerican members for 2025-2027 and thank them for their engagement in wanting to fulfil this challenging mandate, as follows: 

  • Jesús Aguilar. Tecnológico de Monterrey (MX). Chair
  • Rafael Monterde. Universitat Politècnica de València (ES). Vice Chair.
  • Andrea del Pilar Jimenez. Universidad El Bosque (CO). Secretary.
  • Suzette Morrison. Excelsior Community College (JM). Board member.
  • Jorge Carrola. Universidade Nova de Lisboa (PT). Board member.
  • Andrea Ollo. Universidad Pública de Navarra (ES). Board member.
  • Alfredo Armijos. Escuela Politécnica del Litoral (EC). Board member.  .
  • Julissa Cortés. Universidad Tecnológica Centroamericana (HN). Board member.

Special thanks to those academics who were were supporting and involved in the process of the election of this successor Regional Academic Board. We also would like to thank to the participation and engagement to the outgoing ABI members.

SAP University Alliances

entry.title: Read Header Approval USD in PR
entry.content:
Hi Expert 

I have an issue here. I already set workflow PR in the header level. However, after creating PR in USD, the total net price is converted into IDR automatically. Is this normal during the procurement process? Is there any configuration to this, so SAP can read the workflow in the header level?

entry.title: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
This is a task in the July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs".

This task sees you creating a third service, and a first API endpoint within that service. Unlike the previous two services this service will be a more fully formed OData service complete with some sample data. Ready?

Background

The previous two services in this month's Developer Challenge, basic and plain, were fairly simple and only contained API endpoints that were based on simple functions and an action. There were no entities defined in the CDS model, no data, and no implicit, out-of-the-box CRUD+Q OData operations involved. Today's task is where that changes.

Northwind and Northbreeze

For this task and the rest of the tasks this month (there are 4 more after this one), you'll make available API endpoints that all revolve around a simple data model based off the famous Northwind service, various versions of which are running at https://services.odata.org. As you can see from the OData V4 Northwind service's service document there are quite a few "collections", otherwise known by the OData term "entity sets", including:

  • Categories
  • CustomerDemographics
  • Customers
  • Employees
  • Orders
  • Categories
  • Products
  • Regions
  • Shippers
  • Suppliers
  • ...

I like to keep things simple, and often turn to a simplified version that I like to call "Northbreeze" (geddit?), where I just have three entity types, with relations between them:

  • Categories
  • Products
  • Suppliers

I have a live Northbreeze service running at https://qmacro.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/northbreeze and this is based on a simple CAP service that I've defined and made available in a GitHub repo at qmacro/northbreeze. As you can see, there's no actual code, there's just:

  • the schema-level definition of Categories, Products and Suppliers
  • CSV based data to seed the three entity sets that correspond to those entity types
  • an extremely simple service exposing those three entity types via direct projections

And that's pretty much it. Note that the data reflects as accurately as possible the data in the original Northwind service, i.e. there are 77 products ranging from Chai, in the Beverages category, from the supplier Exotic Liquids to Original Frankfurter grüne Soße, in the Condiments category, from the supplier Plutzer Lebensmittelgroßmärkte AG.

You can (and I recommend that you do) clone the repo and use that as a starting point for the service for this and the subsequent tasks in this challenge.

The requirements

Here are the specific requirements for this task.

The service must be served using the OData V4 protocol, with the (default) path prefix /odata/v4 plus the service name northbreeze, i.e.:

/odata/v4/northbreeze
You must make an API endpoint available that returns a sort of "product information" string. The endpoint has a single integer parameter id and the TESTER will make a call to the endpoint with the value of a product ID (it will be between 1 and 77).

It should return a string, formed thus:

<name of the product> by <name of the supplier>

For example, let's take the Northbreeze product with the ID 11:

  • the product name is Queso Cabrales
  • the name of the product's supplier is Cooperativa de Quesos 'Las Cabras'

So the call would be made to:

/odata/v4/northbreeze/productInfo(id=11)
and the expected response should be:
{
  "@odata.context": "$metadata#Edm.String",
  "value": "Queso Cabrales by Cooperativa de Quesos 'Las Cabras'"
}
By the way, looking back at the OData query operation URLs for the supplier of Queso Cabrales just now, did you know that for such scalar properties returned for OData query or read operations (CompanyName in this example) you can get the literal value on its own? Just append /$value to the URL, so that

https://qmacro.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/northbreeze/Products(11)/Supplier/CompanyName

becomes

https://qmacro.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/northbreeze/Products(11)/Supplier/CompanyName/$value

and you get

Cooperativa de Quesos 'Las Cabras'
instead of
{
  "@odata.context": "../../$metadata#Suppliers(5)/CompanyName",
  "value": "Cooperativa de Quesos 'Las Cabras'"
}

The endpoint definition

As you may have worked out by now, this API endpoint needs to be defined as an unbound function (yes, it could be implemented as a function bound to a particular product but we'll be doing that sort of thing in a later task).

When you have defined the endpoint, you should see evidence of it (productInfo) in the OData metadata, which should look like this (vastly reduced for brevity):

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<edmx:Edmx Version="4.0" xmlns:edmx="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edmx">
  <edmx:DataServices>
    <Schema Namespace="northbreeze" xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm">
      <EntityContainer Name="EntityContainer">
        <EntitySet Name="Products" EntityType="northbreeze.Products">
          <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="Category" Target="Categories"/>
          <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="Supplier" Target="Suppliers"/>
        </EntitySet>
        <EntitySet Name="Suppliers" EntityType="northbreeze.Suppliers">
          <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="Products" Target="Products"/>
        </EntitySet>
        <FunctionImport Name="productInfo" Function="northbreeze.productInfo"/>
      </EntityContainer>
      <Function Name="productInfo" IsBound="false" IsComposable="false">
        <Parameter Name="id" Type="Edm.Int32"/>
        <ReturnType Type="Edm.String"/>
      </Function>
    </Schema>
  </edmx:DataServices>
</edmx:Edmx>

The endpoint implementation

The idea of this task is to get you using some CQL. In other words, you'll have to write a simple implementation for this unbound function, writing a handler for the on hook as usual, for the productInfo event.

CQL

If you're not sure where to start, I'd recommend the Querying in JavaScript section of Capire, in particular the SELECT class. Within that SELECT section, you may want to pay particular attention to the following properties:

  • one
  • from
  • columns
  • where

In particular, you'll have to work out how to get a property of a related entity. In other words, how do you express what you want, using the facilities such as path expressions or projection functions described in the columns section. On this topic, you may find this blog post helpful: Turning an OData expand into a cds.ql CQL query with a projection function in CAP.

Using async/await

One more tip: Up until now, you've defined your JavaScript function based handlers for functions and actions in quite a straightforward way. But now you're about to use the SELECT class, which by itself defines a query. It doesn't run it directly. If you read the Executing Queries section of Capire you'll see that "you can just await a constructed query, which by default passes the query to cds.db.run()". That means you can use await in front of your SELECT expression.

But that in turn means that your handler function needs to be defined as an asynchronous one, with async. If you're looking for some examples or inspiration, remember that there are some great CAP samples in the sap-samples org on GitHub. And remember also that GitHub has an excellent search mechanism, where you can express detailed contextual searches, like this one:

org:sap-samples language:js "await SELECT" AND (path:/srv/)

Don't you just love it when you come across a well thought out URL scheme for this sort of search facility? Beautiful.

Setting up for CQL

Note that also, for this handler function and some of the subsequent ones in this service, you'll need a connection to the database layer, and a 'handle' on the Products entity definition (to use in your SELECT expressions, specifically with the .from() method). You can just use this classic pair of constant definitions, before you start to define your on handler:

const db = await cds.connect.to('db')
const { Products } = db.entities

Submitting to the TESTER

Now you're ready to submit your CANDIDATE service, with this new API endpoint, to the TESTER!

The payload

The task identifier you need to supply in the payload of your submission is: northbreeze-productInfo.

You'll have already done this sort of thing previously so just head back there for the more detailed instructions if you need them, or to the the section titled "The Tester service, and making a test request" in the main challenge blog post.

You'll need to submit a JSON payload like this:

{
  "communityid": "<your-community-id>",
  "serviceurl": "<the-URL-of-your-service>",
  "task": "northbreeze-productInfo"
}
And, just as with the previous (and all further tasks):

  • the value for the communityid property should be your ID on this SAP Community platform (e.g. mine is "qmacro")

  • the value for the serviceurl property should be the absolute URL (i.e. including the scheme), of your CANDIDATE service which contains the API endpoint (see ℹ️ A note on URLs and services).

That's it!

Logging of test results

Remember that you can check on your progress, and the progress of your fellow participants - all requests are logged and are available in an entity set served by the TESTER service. The entity set URL is https://developer-challenge-2024-07.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/tester/Testlog and being an OData V4 entity set, all the normal OData system query options are available to you for digging into that information.

Until the next task, have fun, and if you have any questions or comments, leave them below!

entry.title: Re: Physical inventory in EWM for mass materials
entry.content: Hi, not sure what exactly you mean - the inventory document creation can be done in mass in standard T-code /scwm/pi_create - just enter the details like all storage bins and click on create - it will create inventory documents based on the data you entered, can be automatically split by inventory area you setup.  The count should be process for every single record (ie go to the bin, count material, record result). The post is select all lines and push the post in /scwm/PI_PROCESS....

entry.title: BAPI/ FM to load Customer master data with Data services
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Can you please suggest a BAPI/ FM that can be used to create a BP along with customer data like Company code, Address, sales etc..

We checked out RFC_CVI_EI_INBOUND_MAIN, but this is consuming the number range even when we are not committing the changes (i.e. IV_DOCOMMIT = " ").

Thank you so much for your help in advance!

Best Regards,
Het Patel

entry.title: Re: JSON Adapter for ABAP Function Modules
entry.content:
Hi,

two errors found: 

1) It's possible to have an import parameter only typed elementary with 'c'. In abap you can pass a character string of undetermined length. In You implementation it's only allowed to pass one character (the first, the rest will be cutt off)

2) Also it is possible to have import parameter typed with 'SIMPLE'.  In this case the call fails too.

3) If i have for example 3 input parameters non-optional, yours implementation will pass empty values, which is not correct.

 

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: Application Job parameters do not refresh
entry.content:
Hi @michael_szardenings ,

Thank you for suggestion, it helped and probably saved me a couple of hours for debugging ! Just in case, if someone is also looking at this issue, I had to delete & recreate both: application job catalog & application job template. Recreation of job template only, did not help me.

P.S. Though it looks as a valid workaround, I tend to consider it as a bug. It would be fine if SAP could fix it in future.

Regards,

Bohdan

entry.title: Re: Separate Pro forma invoice Number Range and Invoice N...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Do the following SAP Help Portal document and knowledge base article (KBA) answer your question?

Flexible Billing Document Numbering

3253020 - How to set up flexible billing document numbering

And the following KBA may also be interesting:
3471350 - How to create pro forma invoice for free of charge delivery - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: InfoObject Assignment is missing in SAP BW/4HANA for Transformations
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm encountering a problem during creating a Transformation of type Lookup.

I cannot find any option for Assigning InfoObjects in BW Modeling Tools.

I'm using SAP BW/4HANA 2.0.

entry.title: Re: Track Container Unit in BN4L GTT
entry.content: You have to use Tracking Units as mentioned in this guide  https://github.com/SAP-samples/logistics-business-network-gtt-standardapps-samples/tree/main/lbn-gtt-standard-app/Documents

entry.title: Re: Using Virtual Elements with CDS in Fiori elements
entry.content:
Hi,

Can we implement criticality feature through virtual elements?

I have used the below code inside cds view

overall_status as OverallStatus,

case overall_status

when 'O' then 2 -- 'open' | 2: yellow colour

when 'A' then 3 -- 'accepted' | 3: green colour

when 'X' then 1 -- 'rejected' | 1: red colour

else 0 -- 'nothing' | 0: unknown

end as OverallStatusCriticality

 

But I need the same functionality through virtual elements.

 

Is it possible? If it is possible, kindly let me get some sample code.

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Track Container Unit in BN4L GTT
entry.content: Uses the same AOT as Shipment

entry.title: Re: Not able to create a new custom extension in hybris 6.3 using ant modulegen from command prompt
entry.content: Thaks you , this solution is working for me , i have changed extnstion.erbroot=extension_rest_junit and after that i ran ant modulegen and it's working for me. ..... Thank you very much for solution.

entry.title: Re: Generic ABAP utility class to upload and download Exc...
entry.content: It's not possible to delete anything here but a workaround is when your blog post is published, you may set the text "deleted" in the title and body of your question.

Dear Expert,

In sap s4 Hana public cloud I want to run MRP with WBS element wise . So as I Search many Fiori tiles & t codes for MRP run but I did not find any t code where WBS wise I can run mrp.

Thanks & regards,

Namdev

entry.title: Re: Story report Duplicate records Issues
entry.content: We are having the same issue, even when we start the query with "Form Templet". Also, all columns for the same user are the same. What else can the reason be?

entry.title: ADT End of Runnable Exception
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues

I have encountered an exception and need your help to solve it.
Since Last friday, an exception occurs when I try to run my Unit Tests.
My team members are able to run my tests, so the problem applies only to my laptop.
In the error log occurs different logs like begin of runnable and end of runnable.

 

I appreciate every help!!

Regards
Johannes

entry.title: Attachment being sent without attachment header
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I'm having an issue regarding the sending of emails. The email is correctly sent, but when it reachs in Outlook it comes as a BIN file. The original file is sent as a BIN file, but then it's converted to XLSX in the attachment header (&SO_FILENAME=file.XLSX).

In development and quality systems it's working correctly, but in production it isn't.

Can you advise?

 

Thank you,

Regards,

João Vieira.

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content: Love the experimentation! The test fails simply because the TESTER is looking for an empty service document (i.e. no entities listed), as that's what your service should have.

entry.title: Re: Data Source and Service Selection configuration with Template Wizard
entry.content:
@Srikanth,

You have pointed me to the right direction. I went through some of the previous exercises and remembered that in the SAP BTP Cockpit under Trial Account Home, I've generated a service key using a booster while doing this exercise: Preparing your ABAP development environment. I needed to provide the service key in VSCode to connect to SAP BTP.

Best regards,

Alexander Schädlich

entry.title: Re: Attachment being sent without attachment header
entry.content: (deleted)

entry.title: Re: Data Source and Service Selection configuration with...
entry.content: In this exercise:

entry.title: Re: Attachment being sent without attachment header
entry.content:
Changed!

 

Thanks for the heads up!

entry.title: Re: Attachment being sent without attachment header
entry.content: What do you mean exactly concerning "it comes as a BIN file"? Also, it's not clear what means "the original file is sent as a BIN file", I guess you mean that the file is obtained from a place where you use a "binary" transfer versus "text".

entry.title: Re: Attachment being sent without attachment header
entry.content: Please don't post an answer, which is reserved to propose a solution. Instead click on "Show replies" and then "Comment".

entry.title: Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
I can't find Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in SAP Central Business Configuration.

Please help me how to go to this activity.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Create House Bank
entry.content:
• We would like to know the App to create the House Bank.
  • How to generate house banks.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Create House Bank
entry.content:
House Banks are defined in the Bank master data, in the App Manage Banks - Master Data.

Please, find the related help in the KBA I have provided below.

To maintain the basic information of banks ex, House Banks, use the Manage Banks - Master Data app.

Refer to the help in the SAP KBA ##3433056 - How to create Banks.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3433056/E

entry.title: Re: Demystifying Document Management Service on BTP
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have configured a content repository using BTP DMS Integration option and its connection test is successful, however for the associated RFC test it asks for credentials and after multiple attempts with token details as per service key we get unauthorized message. We are trying to configure the content repository in SARA archiving object level. But the store jobs are failing with message "Archive file #### cannot be stored Job canceled after system exception ERROR_MESSAGE".

Requesting your help 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Data Source and Service Selection configuration with Template Wizard
entry.content:
Hello Alexander,

As junwu mentioned, you need to check the details on how you connected to the ABAP system in ADT in eclipse.  If you had provided a service key when connecting via ADT in eclipse, then you will use that same service key in VSCode.

If you had provided an endpoint URL to ADT for the ABAP system, then you need to provide the same URL in VSCode.  You can see more details on the connection types by checking the help portal at: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIORI_tools/17d50220bcd848aa854c9c182d65b699/78a82b6852ce4061ba0825afdb79cda6.html?locale=en-US, under the "Create new system" section.

 

Regards,

Ian

entry.title: Re: Data Source and Service Selection configuration with...
entry.content: https://learning.sap.com/courses/developing-and-extending-sap-fiori-elements-apps/preparing-your-abap-development-environment_LE_e080e56d-36b4-49c9-b94f-90e3f0515ab7 , I have set up an ABAP system in the SAP BTP Cockpit and connected it through ADT in Eclipse. Now, I went through the previous exercises and remembered that during the ABAP system setup, I have generated a service key. This key is what I had to provide in VSCode in order to connect to BTP.

entry.title: Re: Convergent Charging: Recurring Charge not triggered f...
entry.content:
Hello, 

first, check the SAP KBA 3426921 - How to retrieve data related to item creation issues - SAP CC. 

Then, if it doesn't' help you,  you can open the provider contract with the core tool, you should see the last activation date of the item which has recurring fees. This date should be up to date. See Provider Contract>Contract Item>Contracted Charge: Definition. 

if the date is not up to date, check that the Rater is not restart each night (by checking the last restart date of the instance). If you have a daily restart, you could have a memory issue for this specific contract activation. 

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Issues with Contact numbers appearing as link
entry.content:
Hello Community,

In BPA mail body, contact numbers are displayed as link and I have attempted various method to ensure that it does not appear as link, all to no avail. I have also used decision logic to pass fixed numbers and type the + directly to the mail body, still it came as link. The only way around was to remove the plus sign + which is a requirement for the contact numbers and would not serve as a solution for us.

Does anyone know a way to resolve this issue? Looking forward to your contributions. Thank you

entry.title: Re: New PA is not visible V_001P_N
entry.content: Thank you but i have created already .. PA and PSA were created followed by company code assignment (Assignment of PA to company code) but the PA is not visible in v_001p_n

entry.title: Business AI of the Future
entry.content:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) has already made a significant impact on the way businesses operate. From improving customer service with digital assistants to optimizing supply chain management, AI has proven its ability to drive efficiency and innovation across various industries. However, the potential of AI in the business world is still evolving, and the future promises even more transformative advancements.

Enhanced Business Intelligence: In the future, AI will vastly expand its role in business intelligence, providing advanced data analysis, predictive modeling, and actionable insights. With the ability to handle and process colossal amounts of data, AI will enable businesses to make data-driven decisions in real-time, leading to optimized strategies, enhanced customer understanding, and competitive advantages.

Autonomous Business Operations: The future of business AI will see the rise of autonomous operations, where AI systems autonomously manage routine tasks, workflows, and decision-making processes. Intelligent automation powered by AI will streamline repetitive tasks, enhance operational efficiency, and free up human resources to focus on high-value, strategic activities. From inventory management to financial forecasting, AI-driven autonomous operations will fundamentally transform the way businesses function.

Personalized Customer Experiences: AI will continue to play a pivotal role in delivering personalized and intuitive customer experiences. Advanced AI algorithms will enable businesses to tailor products, services, and marketing messages to individual customer preferences in real-time. From personalized product recommendations to dynamic pricing strategies, AI-driven personalization will reshape customer interactions and drive higher engagement and satisfaction.

Ethical AI and Governance: As AI continues to permeate business operations, the responsibility for ethical AI governance will become paramount. Companies will have to ensure that AI applications adhere to ethical standards, are transparent in their decision-making processes, and prioritize fairness and accountability. Striking a balance between innovation and ethical considerations will be crucial for businesses deploying AI systems.

Collaboration Between Humans and AI: The future will witness the integration of AI into the workforce, forming symbiotic relationships between humans and machines. AI will assume roles that are complementary to human capabilities, augmenting productivity and efficiency across diverse business functions. Cultivating a harmonious human-AI collaboration will be essential, as organizations invest in training and development programs to equip their workforce with the necessary skills to leverage AI effectively.

The future of business AI holds immense promise for businesses across various sectors. The advancements in AI technology will fundamentally reshape how companies operate, make decisions, and interact with customers. Embracing and harnessing the potential of AI will be critical for organizations looking to stay ahead in a rapidly evolving business landscape. By strategically integrating AI into their operations and fostering a culture of responsible AI usage, businesses can unlock new opportunities and achieve sustainable growth in the years to come.

At SAP, our uniquely holistic perspective into the demands of global businesses continues to inspire us as we define the future of Business AI.

Looking to learn more?

  • See what SAP Business AI can do for your business
  • Explore Joule, the AI copilot that truly understands your business
  • Learn about our approach to responsible and ethical AI
  • Visit the SAP Community to discover AI articles and know-how
  • Gain valuable AI skills with an SAP Learning Journey
  • Sign up for the SAP AI newsletter

entry.title: Building an End-to-End RAG Application Using FastAPI on BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Introduction

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) applications significantly enhance the contextual relevance of large language model (LLM) outputs by integrating real-time database lookups. This tutorial provides a step-by-step guide to implementing an end-to-end RAG application using FastAPI and deploying it on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Cloud Foundry. Special thanks to my colleague Yu Xuan @yxlee12345, who came up with the FastAPI template for BTP CF app.

Prerequisites

  • Python 3.9
  • Poetry for dependency management

Initial Setup

Poetry is used here to manage all Python dependencies. Follow the installation guide to install poetry if you haven’t already.

Create a pyproject.toml file to specify all required dependencies for the app:

 

[tool.poetry]
name = "end-to-end-rag-example-fastapi"
version = "0.1.0"
description = ""
authors = [
		"Yang Yue <yue.yang02@sap.com>",
		"Lee Yu Xuan <yu.xuan.lee@sap.com>"
		]

[tool.poetry.dependencies]
python = "^3.9"
fastapi = "^0.92.0"
uvicorn = "^0.20.0"
cfenv = "^0.5.3"
sap-xssec = "^4.0.0"
python-multipart = "^0.0.5"
requests = "^2.28.2"
pandas = "^2.2.2"
hana-ml = "^2.20.24042601"
langchain = "^0.1.19"
shapely = "^2.0.4"
pyyaml = { version = "!=6.0.0,!=5.4.0,!=5.4.1" }
urllib3 = "<2"
python-dotenv = "^1.0.1"

[tool.poetry.group.dev.dependencies]
black = "^23.7.0"
isort = "^5.12.0"

[build-system]
requires = ["poetry-core>=1.0.0"]
build-backend = "poetry.core.masonry.api"

[tool.isort]
profile = "black"

[tool.black]
line-length = 120

 

Set up your development environment:

 

# Ensure you're using the correct Python version
poetry env use python3.9

# Install all required dependencies
poetry install

# Activate virtual environment
poetry shell

# Generate the requirements.txt file (run this if there are changes to Python dependencies), which will be used later to build the Docker image
poetry export -f requirements.txt -o requirements.txt --without-hashes

 

Implementation Details

Core Functionalities

  • Run SAP Business Optical Character Recognition (BOCR) on a given PDF file
  • Convert text into embeddings
  • Store embeddings in HANA vector database
  • Perform similarity search and retrieve relevant contexts
  • Send prompts with retrieved contexts to LLMs for responses

Step-by-Step Implementation

Step 1: Initialize HANA Connection

The first step is to establish a secure connection to your SAP HANA instance. Ensure the credential object passed to this function has all required fields.

 

from hana_ml import ConnectionContext

def initialize_hana_connection_context(credentials: dict) -> ConnectionContext:
    cc = ConnectionContext(
        address=credentials["host"],
        port=credentials["port"],
        user=credentials["user"],
        password=credentials["password"],
        currentSchema=credentials["schema"],
        encrypt=True,
    )
    return cc

 

Step 2: Read and Process PDF

Use SAP BOCR to extract text content from a given PDF file. This text will then be converted into embeddings for further processing.

 

import requests
import pandas as pd
import os

def process_document(file_path: str, token: str, service_url: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Process document using SAP BOCR service and return a DataFrame with page contents."""
    data = {'options': '{"lang": "en", "outputType": "json"}'}
    files = {'files': (os.path.basename(file_path), open(file_path, 'rb'))}
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}

    response = requests.post(service_url, headers=headers, files=files, data=data)
    if response.status_code != 200:
        raise Exception(f"OCR request failed with status code {response.status_code}")

    bocr_result = response.json()
    page_contents = {}

    for item in bocr_result["predictions"]:
        page = item["page"]
        content_str = " ".join(
            [" ".join([word_box["content"] for word_box in line_box["word_boxes"]]) for line_box in item["line_boxes"]]
        )
        page_contents.setdefault(page, []).append(content_str.strip())

    df = pd.DataFrame(page_contents.items(), columns=["page", "content"])
    df["content"] = df["content"].apply(lambda x: " ".join(x))
    return df

 

Step 3: Generate Embeddings and Store in HANA

Convert the extracted text into embeddings using an embedding model and store these embeddings in the HANA database.

 

import requests

def get_embedding(input: str, embedding_deployment_id: str, oauth_token: str) -> str:
    """Get embedding for a given input text."""
    test_input = {"model": "text-embedding-ada-002", "input": input}
    deployment_url_prefix = "<https://your-model-deployment-url-prefix>"  # Replace with your own model deployment URL prefix
    deployment_url = deployment_url_prefix + embedding_deployment_id
    endpoint = f"{deployment_url}/embeddings?api-version=2023-05-15"
    headers = {
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {oauth_token}",
        "ai-resource-group": embedding_deployment_id,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
    }
    response = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=test_input)
    return response.json()["data"][0]["embedding"]

def generate_embedding_and_prepare_dataframe_for_hana(df: pd.DataFrame, oauth_token: str, embedding_deployment_id: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """Generate embeddings and prepare DataFrame for HANA."""
    df["vector_string"] = df["content"].apply(
        lambda x: str(get_embedding(x, embedding_deployment_id=embedding_deployment_id, oauth_token=oauth_token))
    )
    return df

def create_table_in_hana(connection_context: ConnectionContext, table_name: str = "end_to_end_rag_example_table"):
    """Create table in HANA database."""
    try:
        cursor = connection_context.connection.cursor()
        cursor.execute(
            f"""
            CREATE TABLE {table_name}(
                page NVARCHAR(50),
                content NCLOB,
                vector REAL_VECTOR(1536)
            );
        """)
        connection_context.connection.commit()
    except:
        pass
    finally:
        cursor.close()

def insert_data_into_hana(connection_context: ConnectionContext, df: pd.DataFrame, oauth_token: str, embedding_deployment_id: str, table_name: str = "end_to_end_rag_example_table"):
    """Insert data into HANA table."""
    cursor = connection_context.connection.cursor()
    insert_sql = f"INSERT INTO {table_name} (page, content, vector) VALUES (?, ?, TO_REAL_VECTOR(?))"for _, row in df.iterrows():
        vector_str = str(get_embedding(row["content"], embedding_deployment_id, oauth_token)).replace(" ", "")
        cursor.execute(insert_sql, (row["page"], row["content"], vector_str))
    connection_context.connection.commit()
    cursor.close()

 

Step 4: Perform Similarity Search

Once the embeddings are stored, perform a similarity search to retrieve the most relevant contexts for a given query.

 

def run_vector_search(oauth_token: str, connection_context: ConnectionContext, query: str, embedding_deployment_id: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    query_vector = get_embedding(query, embedding_deployment_id, oauth_token)
    sql = f"SELECT TOP 4 PAGE, CONTENT FROM end_to_end_rag_example_table ORDER BY COSINE_SIMILARITY(VECTOR, TO_REAL_VECTOR('{query_vector}')) DESC"
    hdf = connection_context.sql(sql)
    return hdf.collect()

 

Step 5: Generate Prompt and Get Response from LLM

Generate a prompt using the retrieved contexts and get a response from the LLM.

 

from langchain.prompts import PromptTemplate

def generate_prompt(context_str: str, query: str) -> str:
    """Generate prompt for LLM."""
    prompt_template_fstring = """
    You are an SAP legal expert.
    You are provided multiple context items that are related to the prompt you have to answer.
    Use the following pieces of context to answer the question at the end.

    Context:
    {context}

    Question:
    {query}
    """
    prompt_template = PromptTemplate.from_template(prompt_template_fstring)
    return prompt_template.format(query=query, context=context_str)

def get_response(oauth_token: str, input: str, chat_deployment_id: str) -> str:
    """Get response from chat model."""
    test_chat_input = {
        "model": "gpt-35-turbo",
        "messages": [{"content": input, "role": "user"}],
        "temperature": 0.0,
        "max_tokens": 250,
    }

    deployment_url_prefix = "<https://your-model-deployment-url-prefix>"  # Replace with your own model deployment URL prefix
    deployment_url = deployment_url_prefix + chat_deployment_id
    endpoint = f"{deployment_url}/chat/completions?api-version=2023-05-15"
    headers = {
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {oauth_token}",
        "ai-resource-group": chat_deployment_id,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
    }

    chat_response = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=test_chat_input)
    return chat_response.json()["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]

 

Step 6: Define ask_llm Function

Define the ask_llm function to connect all functionalities.

 

def ask_llm(query: str, embedding_deployment_id: str, chat_deployment_id: str) -> dict:
    # Fetch credentials using your preferred method
    resource_group_credentials = get_service_credentials("resource_group_service_key")
    oauth_token = get_oauth_token(resource_group_credentials)

    hana_credentials = get_service_credentials("hana_vector_db_service_key")
    connection_context = initialize_hana_connection_context(hana_credentials)

    bocr_service_credentials = get_service_credentials("bocr_credential")
    file_path = bocr_service_credentials['file_path']
    token = bocr_service_credentials['token']
    service_url = bocr_service_credentials['service_url']

    df = process_document(file_path, token, service_url)

    # Prepare data and insert into HANA
    df = generate_embedding_and_prepare_dataframe_for_hana(df, oauth_token, embedding_deployment_id)
    create_table_in_hana(connection_context)
    insert_data_into_hana(connection_context, df, oauth_token, embedding_deployment_id)

    # Perform similarity search
    context = run_vector_search(oauth_token, connection_context, query, embedding_deployment_id)
    context_str = " ".join(context["CONTENT"].astype("string"))

    # Generate prompt and get response
    prompt = generate_prompt(context_str, query)
    response = get_response(oauth_token, input=prompt, chat_deployment_id=chat_deployment_id)

    return {"query": query, "context": context.to_json(orient="records"), "response": response}

 

Step 7: FastAPI Endpoint to Handle RAG Requests

Combine all the above functionalities into a FastAPI endpoint to handle incoming RAG requests.

 

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, Request
from pydantic import BaseModel
import logging
from sap import xssec

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def get_security_context(auth_header: str) -> xssec.SecurityContextXSUAA:
    from src.config import UAA_SERVICE

    access_token = auth_header.replace("Bearer ", "")
    return xssec.create_security_context(access_token, UAA_SERVICE)

def verify_request(request: Request):
    # Get Authorization header
    auth_header = request.headers.get("Authorization")
    if auth_header is None:
        error_msg = "Authorization token not found in request header"
        logger.error(error_msg)
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=401,
            detail={
                "title": "Authorization Header Missing",
                "details": error_msg,
                "status": 401,
            },
        )
    # Validate token
    try:
        xsuaa_context = get_security_context(auth_header)
    except RuntimeError as e:
        if e.args == ("Audience Validation Failed",):
            error_msg = "Client credentials used to generate XSUAA access token are different from expected"
            logger.error(error_msg)
            raise HTTPException(
                status_code=401,
                detail={
                    "title": "Wrong Client Credentials",
                    "details": error_msg,
                    "status": 401,
                },
            )
        raise
    if not xsuaa_context:
        error_msg = "XSUAA is not configured correctly"
        logger.error(error_msg)
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=401,
            detail={"title": "XSUAA misconfiguration", "details": error_msg, "status": 401},
        )

    # Only allow logged in users
    if not xsuaa_context.get_grant_type:
        error_msg = "Please input the correct grant type"
        logger.error(error_msg)
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=403,
            detail={"title": "Grant type mismatch", "details": error_msg, "status": 403},
        )

    logger.info("User verification completed successfully")
 
class AskRequest(BaseModel):
    query: str
    embedding_deployment_id: str
    chat_deployment_id: str
    
class AskResponse(BaseModel):
    query: str
    context: str
    response: str

router = APIRouter()

@router.post("/ask", response_model=AskResponse, tags=["RAG"], summary="Send a query to LLMs.")
def ask_llm_endpoint(request: AskRequest, auth: None = Depends(verify_request)):
    try:
        result = ask_llm(
            query=request.query,
            embedding_deployment_id=request.embedding_deployment_id,
            chat_deployment_id=request.chat_deployment_id,
        )
        return AskResponse(**result)
    except Exception as e:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail=str(e))

 

Deployment to BTP Cloud Foundry

Step 1: Create Manifest File

Create a manifest.yml file for your Cloud Foundry deployment configuration:

 

---
applications:
  - name: rag-example-rest-api
    disk-quota: 4G
    memory: 512MB
    random-route: false
    instances: 1
    # Specify services to bind with this app on BTP
    services:
      - contract-intelligence-xsuaa # Name of the xsuaa service
      -	sapai_bocr_service # Name of the BOCR service 
      - resource_group_service_key # Name of the RG credential service (user-defined)
      - hana_vector_db_service_key # Name of the HANA credential service (user-defined)
    env:
      APP_NAME: End-to-end RAG REST API
      UAA_SERVICE_NAME: contract-intelligence-xsuaa
      API_MAJOR_VERSION_LATEST: "1"

 

Step 2: Create an Entrypoint Python Script to Run the Application

Create a run.py file to run your FastAPI application:

 

import uvicorn

from src.config import APP_HOST, APP_PORT, APP_WORKER, LOCAL_APP

if __name__ == "__main__":
    if LOCAL_APP:
        uvicorn.run("src.api.main:app", host=APP_HOST, port=APP_PORT, workers=APP_WORKER, reload=True)
    else:
        uvicorn.run("src.api.main:app", host=APP_HOST, port=APP_PORT, workers=APP_WORKER)

 

Step 3: Create Dockerfile for Containerization

Create a Dockerfile to containerize your FastAPI application:

 

FROM python:3.9.14-slim-buster

# Install tzdata for the missing timezone in ubuntu docker image; DEBIAN_FRONTEND for non-interactive installation
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND='noninteractive'

# Argument is passed in from docker-compose.yml file .e.g api
ARG SRC_PATH='.'

RUN apt-get -y update && \\
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \\
    python3-dev \\
    curl \\
    build-essential \\
    libmagic-dev \\
    poppler-utils \\
    && apt-get clean \\
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Setup permissions group and user under which the micro service will run
RUN groupadd -r nonroot &&\\
    useradd -r -g nonroot -b /home -m nonroot && \\
    usermod -aG sudo nonroot && \\
    echo "nonroot ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL" >> /etc/sudoers
USER nonroot

# Copy requirements from app and shared
COPY ${SRC_PATH}/requirements.txt /tmp/

# Always installed shared requirements first, since app may have dependencies that overwrite that
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U pip setuptools && pip3 install wheel
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir --user -r /tmp/requirements.txt

# Copy source code from microservice folder and the shared folder
COPY ${SRC_PATH}/src /home/nonroot/src
COPY ${SRC_PATH}/run.py /home/nonroot/run.py

WORKDIR /home/nonroot
ENV PYTHONPATH /

CMD python3 run.py

 

Step 4: Install CF CLI Tool

Refer to the official documentation to install CF CLI v8.

Step 5: Build and Push Docker Image to Artifactory

Create a scripts/build_push_to_artifactory.py file to handle building and pushing the Docker image to a container registry (e.g. Docker Hub).

 

import argparse
import os
import subprocess

def main(args):
    # Build Docker image
    image_base_name = os.path.basename(os.getcwd()) if args.image_base_name is None else args.image_base_name
    full_image_name = f"{container_registry_url}/{image_base_name}:{args.image_tag}"
    returncode = subprocess.call(f"docker build -t {full_image_name} .", shell=True)
    if returncode != 0:
        print("Error occurred while building Docker image, exiting...")
        exit(returncode)

    # Push Docker image
    if args.no_push:
        print("Pushing to Artifactory has been disabled, exiting now...")
        exit(0)
    returncode = subprocess.call(f"docker login {container_registry_url}", shell=True)
    if returncode != 0:
        print("Error occurred while trying to login to Artifactory, exiting now...")
        exit(returncode)
    returncode = subprocess.call(f"docker push {full_image_name}", shell=True)
    if returncode != 0:
        print("Error occurred while trying to push image to Artifactory, exiting now...")
        exit(returncode)
    print(f"Push to Artifactory completed for image {full_image_name}, exiting now...")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Build Docker image API server and optionally push to ACRMLH")
    parser.add_argument("container_registry_url", type=str, help="Repository domain for the Docker image")
    parser.add_argument("image_tag", type=str, help="Docker image tag to be added")
    parser.add_argument(
        "--image-base-name",
        type=str,
        default=None,
        help="Docker image name without the domain. Will be set to name of directory if no input is given",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--no-push",
        action="store_true",
        help="Flag to disable pushing of image to Artifactory, to test if Docker container starts from image as expected",
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()
    main(args)

 

Activate your virtual environment and run the Python script to build and push the Docker image.

Note that the container_registry_url should be the actual URL for the registry where you want to push the image.

 

poetry shell
python scripts/build_push_to_artifactory.py <container_registry_url> <image_tag>

 

Step 6: Deploy to CF Dev Space

Log in to your CF dev space and push the Docker container:

 

cf login
cf push --docker-image <container_registry_url>/<image-name>:<image-tag> --docker-username <docker_user_name>

 

Conclusion

This tutorial provides a clear pathway to implementing a RAG application using FastAPI and deploying it on BTP Cloud Foundry. By following these steps, you can enhance your LLM applications with real-time contextual data, ensuring more relevant and accurate responses.

For detailed interaction with HANA Vector DB, please check out one of my previous posts. Additionally, for building a RAG application in Python with LangChain, HANA Vector DB, and Generative AI Hub SDK, please refer to @yxlee12345's previous post. Feel free to customize the logic to fit your specific requirements.

 

References

If you’re an SAP employee and have access to https://github.tools.sap, you can access this link to view the entire repository.

entry.title: Data conversion in the target system or in the source system
entry.content:
Hi community!

I wanted to ask about the differences of data conversion in the target and in the source system.

My questions would be specific to your reasoning of why you choose one approach and if you need to do both. As I understand it, some reasons are the new features on a target system and the limitation of data on the source system.

Also, the general approaches involve, as it is stated, that the main conversions and data cleansing happen on the named systems. Only small adjustments would be made on the other system to make the data transfer possible in the first place.

I would appreciate any information on this topic.

Best regards and much thanks!

entry.title: Re: OData V2 Request fails and no error message is displayed
entry.content: Yes, the client 100 is correct. I know how to debug the OData service, but I assume since no error log is given that the request does not even get to the GetEntitySet method. But I will give it a try.

entry.title: SAP RISE Security Audit Log Monitoring with SIEM
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

I have a use case which requires to pipe SAP Security Audit Logs out to managed SIEM for auditing and security monitoring, understand for on-prem SAP server is able to turn on Security Security Audit Logs and install the log collector on the same server, however in my case would be SAP RISE. I am not the owner of the SAP so I can't perform any tests or seek SAP vendor support. 

Has anyone has this requirement or solution to this? 

I chanced upon this Data Transfer from SAP to SFTP server Using OS Com... - SAP Community but not sure if it is applicable to SAP RISE as well. 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Annotation to add Parameters for Intent Based Navigation in SAP RAP Development
entry.content: Hi @devanand_l,

entry.title: BW/4HANA does an option exists to limit resources consumed by a query?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

in BW/4HANA, does exists some options to limit a query resource consumption (CPU / Memory)?

We have a case in which some users will run a query with many columns and many rows (a case of "Self Service BI" from a query with many measures and attributes).

We want to set some limits to the execution to avoid that a single user block everyone else.

We are aware of:

- Authorizations (row based filtering).

- Variables prompt - Input parameter mapping.

- Hybrid modeling with calculation view as source of a composite provider (all the logic will be inside the calculation view apart from star schema mapping).

I want to ask if there are some options for example:

- Max execution time.

- Max memory usage.

- Max CPU time.

To set some boundaries to the non controlled activities that an user can do.

Best Regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Re: Annotation to add Parameters for Intent Based Navigation in SAP RAP Development
entry.content: Hi @devanand_l, did you find the solution for this? I'm facing the same problem, and I also believe it's related with the difference between fields name.

entry.title: How can I prepare for the SAP SuccessFactors Succession Management certification?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring SAP SuccessFactors Succession Management learning journey

Overview
This learning journey will guide you through the configurations necessary to implement SAP SuccessFactors Succession Management.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to perform and configure the core functionalities within SAP SuccessFactors Succession Management and access the resources and support available to configure additional features.

Prerequisites

  • Exploring the SAP SuccessFactors Platform

Book your certification exam
Validate your skills and learning by completing the certification exam and gain a highly recognised accreditation.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Demystifying Document Management Service on BTP
entry.content: @Privete_member__1322017 You should post here only comments to the blog post. To post a question to "all", go there: Technology Q&A | SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Data Source and Service Selection configuration with...
entry.content:
Thanks!

To connect to the back end in Eclipse, I had to both provide a service key and log in. That confused me, and I forgot about the service key though remembered the login part 🙂 In VSCode, I wasn't prompted to log in but to provide the service key. Now that I've done that, it works.

Best regards,

Alexander Schädlich

entry.title: Automate with an API Integration.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to check the PD API capabilities which can be accomplished, as example extracting the DDL from the Physical Model and used. Automate with an API Integration.

What's steps using which this automation can be accomplished.
.
Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Automate with an API Integration.
entry.content:
Please refer to the following documents for the information you need.
How-to request, see Customizing and Extending PowerDesigner > Scripting PowerDesigner 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_POWERDESIGNER/31c48596e34446a68956e0aa7e700a2e/c7d647336e1b1014b0a0bce93c2ce2a8.html?&version=16.7.01

KBA 3357952 - Where to find PowerDesigner API info
https://me.sap.com/notes/0003357952

entry.title: Re: Formula for value on a component in a BOM... or sugge...
entry.content:
Hi,

This could be achieved via SAP variant configuration functionality.

Please refer the below for details on the concept. You can also research more on SAP variant configuration functionality in the community.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/a73402f511734e6eac56063e631bf24e/c162b6531de6b64ce10000000a174cb4.html

Also refer below for using dependency formula with rounding up, similar to your case.

https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-questions/round-up-of-value-output-coming-through-dependency-formula-in-variant/qaq-p/12362962

Hope this will assist you.

entry.title: Re: eDocument Romania - Supplier Invoice - SOAP:1033 Oper...
entry.content: Hi @afakhrul, maybe you are missing some of the required customizing. I suggest you to refer to the overview note 3262931 and the official Help Guide here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/bb30b322546c446ab74a1ba659cecdf2/e21fd8c6bdc640a2baf2ceea6fb88cfb.html Regards

entry.title: Re: Triggering a CPI process from SuccessFactors Intelligent Services
entry.content:
Edit: Might have found the correct documentation for the SOAP adapter. Working on a test now to verify.

Hi! Thanks for this great blog post.
I'm trying to replicate this process, to be able to trigger CPI from ISC, but I face some issues.

How do you set up the SOAP sender to listen for the ISC? I guess it should be obvious, but I cant figure it out. In the iFlow, I have the SOAP 1.x connection. It asks for an address (relative endpoint), service, endpoint and more. And I cant find it documented well enough to be able to set it up correctly.

Thanks for any further information on how to actually set up my first connection between ISC and CPI!

@NabarunKundu

entry.title: Re: New PA is not visible V_001P_N
entry.content: Hi, if the PSA is visible in table T001P chek it under img path Personal Subareas> Copy, delete, check personnel subarea

entry.content: I know it's been a while (it is now 2024) but your answer is clear and to the point, thank you

entry.title: Archive file #### cannot be stored Job canceled after system exception ERROR_MESSAGE
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have configured a content repository using BTP DMS Integration option and its connection test is successful, however for the associated RFC test it asks for credentials and after multiple attempts with token details as per service key we get unauthorized message. We are trying to configure the content repository in SARA archiving object level. But the store jobs are failing with message "Archive file #### cannot be stored Job canceled after system exception ERROR_MESSAGE".

Requesting your help 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am Kamil Gedikli and I can identify myself in following categories.

  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

In the digitalised world of public administration, it is essential to master the SAP programme. SAP is a widely recognised software that optimises business processes and increases efficiency. Learning SAP has many benefits for public administration graduates. Firstly, it leads to increased efficiency and effectiveness in managing operational processes, resulting in resource optimisation and faster decision making. Secondly, it creates new career opportunities as SAP skills are in high demand in both the public and private sectors. Third, the programme provides powerful tools for data management and analysis, leading to informed policy development and improved public services. Finally, the global use of SAP increases access to global job opportunities by enabling the acquisition of knowledge and skills of international standards. As a result, the acquisition of SAP skills is crucial for specialisation and career progression in public administration and provides a competitive advantage in the current and future world of work.

I'm so excited to hear from you about this amazing opportunity from SAP! I'm really looking forward to hearing back from you.

Regards,

Kamil Gedikli

entry.title: Re: Event-Based Revenue Recognition - DropShipment
entry.content:
Thank you very much for your answer. 

Currently DropShipment for EBRR is available in Public Cloud only. Do you know when it will be available in Private Edition?

Kind regards,

Christine

entry.title: Re: Scope 4N6 CIM to S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi @ravalika in the App Upload Supplier Invoices Centrally You can upload invoices from your computer. to view the draft invoices go to app Manage Supplier Invoices Centrally. For field Status, choose Draft from the dropdown list, and choose Go. The newly uploaded draft invoices is displayed at the top of the search result. You can see that a unique central invoice ID is generated and assigned to each draft invoice. Automatic invoice processing including document extraction service and business rules definition is triggered to save non-PO or PO based invoice.Open the draft invoice generated from the file you uploaded. Check if everything is correct or any error message is showing up or mandatory fields missing. Save the changes. To submit to the connected S/4HC choose Submit buttom. Then cou can check your back end system for the replicated invoice.

Please note that from upload to draft invoice it can take some minutes, until you find the invoice in the list view of uploaded invoices.

entry.title: Re: F4IF_FIELD_VALUE_REQUEST => a good FM to get multiple value with F4 ?
entry.content: After 17 years I can only concur with Leandro's statement ... Tnx Narendran!

entry.title: SAP LM01 PROCESS TO FIORI APPLICATION
entry.content:
Initially we were using LM01 tcode in SAP ITS technology in TAB but now we shifted to fiori technology and we have created tile of lm01 in fiori application, it is transaction based fiori applications are shown up in TAB but the screens are not user friendly so do we need to create free style fiori application using sapui5 .

Please help in resolving this issue.

entry.title: Re: Update on the SAP Identity Management migration to Microsoft Entra
entry.content:
Thanks to the SAP + Microsoft team providing all these in-detail documents. I cannot stress how useful the CIO Guide has been to me in the past.

However, the Microsoft article has some odd details that do not completely match up with what I've seen in my own projects. But already got in touch with the authors and will try to clarify those points.

entry.title: Actions don't start in processes
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
I have some workflows developed with Process Automation that use APIs through actions.

Since last week, actions in processes are not started or start after many hours. I have no error messages or anything else, it just stays stuck when the action starts.

What could it be?

With the tests, actions work properly.

Best Regards

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: Business Partner Customer Vendor Integration (CVI) with update possibilities using BAPI
entry.content: CMD_MIG_BP_CVI_CREATE is still obsolete, not not for Data Services. I'm not aware of any released ABAP API for BP including customer/supplier data, but have anyway left that topic five years ago. any released ABAP API for Business Partner, but have left that topic five Years ago anyway

entry.title: Query on PageSize Property in S/4 HANA Business Partner
entry.content:
Dear All,

Good Day to Everyone

Is there a PageSize property available in S/4 HANA Business Partner? Setting this property should return all the specified records from the system.

Regards

Rahul Jain
